# Rocco Russo

> Software engineer and tech lead with 10+ years in React, TypeScript, Web3 and DeFi. Personal site for sharing experience, projects and credentials.

## Profile

- [Home](https://linkedin-roccorusso.work): Profile overview — experience, projects, skills and endorsements.
- [Experience](https://linkedin-roccorusso.work/experience): Full work history, roles, and key achievements.
- [Projects](https://linkedin-roccorusso.work/projects): Featured side projects and open-source work.
- [Skills](https://linkedin-roccorusso.work/skills): Tech stack with proficiency levels and endorsements.
- [Recommendations](https://linkedin-roccorusso.work/recommendations): References from peers and collaborators.

## Contact

- [Personal site](https://rocco.me): Primary portfolio and writing.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/xdemocle): Open source contributions.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/roccorusso): Professional network profile.
